{2}{U}: Check. If your check revealed a God card. Put it into your hand. Otherwise, you may put it into your graveyard. [i](Look at the top card of your library. You can reveal it.)[/i]
You may cast a creature card from your sanctum with mana value X or less, where X is the number of cards in your sanctum minus five.
Whenever Jet Dolphin attacks, if a card was put into your hand and wasn't drawn, it gains flying until end of turn.

Reach
Whenever Combat Squirrel blocks a creature with flying, it gets +2/+0 until end of turn.
When Ruin Shade enters, mill three cards and check. [i](Look at the top card of your library. You can reveal it.)[/i]

When CI07 Evil-Eye Channeler strides, you may activate the following ability without paying its costs.
{2}{I}: Target creature you don't control becomes an enchantment until end of turn.

When you cast this spell, if you control a creature with power 4 or greater, copy it.
Look at the top three cards of your library. You may reveal a creature or land card from among them and put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

This spell costs {2} less to cast if a card was put into your hand and wasn't drawn this turn.
Draw three cards, then discard a card.
CI02 Purple Trapezist can't be blocked unless each attacking creature with mana value 4 or greater is also blocked.
At the beginning of combat, you may have Decay Dragon gain flying and decayed. [i](It can't block. When it attacks, sacrifice it at end of combat.)[/i]
Whenever you attack, if a creature died this turn, target creature gains first strike until end of turn.
Search your library for up to two basic land cards, reveal those cards, put one onto the battlefield tapped and the other into your sanctum.
Reveal a random card from your sanctum and put it into your hand. Up to one target creature gets +2/-2 until end of turn.

Look at four random cards from your sanctum. Put one of them into your hand.
